scripts.deploy:git: git add -A && git reset .dev.vars.backup .env.simple .env.test deploy-worker.bat scripts/build/ scripts/deploy/ scripts/system/ scripts/update-version.js && git add . && git commit --no-verify --allow-empty -m "chore(release): v$npm_package_version" && git push
scripts.deploy:
npm run update-version && npm install && npm run clean && npm run build && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:hosting && npm run deploy:git && echo "

======================================
✅ ALL DEPLOY TASKS COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY!
======================================
"
